name: EZ Pawn Corp
description_short: EZ Pawn Corp Long Island City, New York — EZ Pawn Corp is a family-owned pawnbroker with 17 NYC locations offering collateral-based loans and buy/sell s...
description_long:
EZ Pawn Corp was established in 1996 by David Kaminsky, continuing a three-generation pawnbroking legacy that began with his father Martin Kaminsky's founding of Gem Pawnbrokers in Brooklyn in 1947. The company operates as a family business that has grown into one of the fastest-expanding pawn broking chains in New York City, maintaining its emphasis on integrity and community service while modernizing its operations.

The company offers pawn loans secured by items of value, with advertised rates of 4% per month. Customers can bring personal items for appraisal by trained loan officers, receive a loan agreement, and walk away with cash in hand. EZ Pawn Corp also operates a buy/sell retail model where customers can purchase pre-owned items and sell personal goods. The website includes a loan calculator showing examples (e.g., $100 borrowed for 1 month costs $116 total with $16 in interest and fees). They specifically note compliance with the Military Lending Act, offering 36% APR to active duty service members and their dependents.

EZ Pawn Corp distinguishes itself through family ownership continuity, multi-generational expertise in watch repair and jewelry appraisal, and an explicit commitment to community giving through partnerships with organizations like the Kiss Cares Coat Drive and NYC AIDS Walk. The company emphasizes friendly customer service and professional store operations across its 17 locations. Media coverage from CBS 2 New York and The New York Times highlights their positioning as a reliable lending option for short-term "bridge" loans, while also functioning as a discount retail destination.

As a pawn shop, EZ Pawn Corp serves customers needing immediate cash liquidity in exchange for collateral, which carries inherent risks including potential loss of personal items. While customer testimonials praise their service and pricing, pawn lending typically involves higher costs than traditional credit. The company's stated loan rates and fee structures should be carefully evaluated against individual financial circumstances and alternatives.
address: 25-04 Queens Plaza S, Long Island City, NY 11101

company_info.headquarters: 25-04 Queens Plaza S, Long Island City, NY 11101

pros: 17 conveniently located stores throughout New York City for accessibility
Immediate cash payment in hand with no waiting period for loan approval
Trained and knowledgeable loan officers experienced in jewelry and watch appraisal
Complies with Military Lending Act, offering 36% APR to active duty service members and dependents
Three-generation family business established since 1996 with documented operational history
Online loan calculator tool for transparent upfront cost estimation
Community involvement through partnerships with charitable organizations like Kiss Cares and NYC AIDS Walk
Multiple service options including pawning, buying, and selling of merchandise
cons: 4% monthly interest rate (48% APR) is substantially higher than traditional credit products
Risk of losing collateral items if loans cannot be repaid or renewed
Additional fees not fully detailed on website (storage, handling, late fees mentioned as subject to change)
Limited to NYC locations despite growth; no indication of online or mail-in services
Customer testimonials are undated (2017-2019) with no recent reviews visible on main pages
best_for: NYC residents needing same-day emergency cash secured by personal items
Active duty military members and dependents seeking lower-cost pawn loans under Military Lending Act
Customers seeking to buy pre-owned jewelry, electronics, or other items at discounted prices
Individuals with items of value who prefer collateral-based lending over unsecured personal loans
diagnosis: EZ Pawn Corp is best suited for NYC residents experiencing immediate cash shortfalls who possess items of value they can temporarily forfeit as collateral. The primary caveat is that pawn lending carries significantly higher costs than traditional credit and creates risk of permanent loss of personal property if loans cannot be repaid; consumers should exhaust other options (emergency funds, 0% credit cards, credit union loans) before using pawn services.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans with immediate cash disbursement
Item appraisal services by trained loan officers
Buy services for customer items (jewelry, electronics, etc.)
Sell services offering pre-owned merchandise inventory
Online loan calculator for cost estimation
Military Lending Act compliant 36% APR loans for active duty and dependents
Watch repair expertise (historical service from family legacy)
